_doc: The quality-tools registry — the one home for 'what does GREEN mean in this project' (PROTOCOL.md `## Quality tools`). The Builder runs every `build`-beat tool and hands back only when they pass; the Reviewer confirms the `review`-beat tools ran and reads their output. The runner is `node .ai-dev/quality/run.mjs <beat>`. No core edit is ever needed to add or change a tool — only a row here.

_row_shape.checks: one plain line: what this tool catches
_row_shape.config: path to its native config beside this file, or null if none
_row_shape.run: the command to run it (from the project root)
_row_shape.beat: build | review | ship — which loop beat it runs in
_row_shape.init: one line: how to install/enable it

tools.checks: JVM unit test assertions across transport, crypto, identity, sync, directory, chatdirectory, message, protocol, data modules
Android manifest, permission, API-level, and resource issues
Committed secrets, keys, credentials, tokens in source tree and git history
tools.init: install gitleaks (brew install gitleaks / go install)

tools.checks: Room schema export directory exists and is non-empty — catches if exportSchema is turned off
Android instrumented tests on device/emulator — database migration, native crypto, identity, directory, chat-directory, keystore
tools.init: requires a connected Android device or running emulator (adb devices)
